title: Midnight at the Diner
summary: After the riverside case, a second body turns up behind Sam's diner. A locked freezer, a missing cook, and a town that wants answers before breakfast.
location_hint: Unlocks after solving The Riverside Murder. Start at the diner alley.

evidence.name: Kitchen Knife
evidence.description: Wiped clean but with grease residue matching the night fryer oil.

evidence.name: Broken Padlock
evidence.description: Forced from the outside. Someone wanted into the walk-in — or wanted someone sealed in.

evidence.name: Gambling IOUs
evidence.description: Owen's name all over a backroom book. The cook was the lender.

suspects.name: Owen Pike
suspects.bio: Cleared of the river murder — but debts don't sleep.

suspects.name: Sam
suspects.bio: Owns the alley. Insurance would look convenient — if you think the worst.

suspects.name: Vera Lang
suspects.bio: Was seen near the diner arguing about a late-night permit.

bartender_sam.speaker: Sam
bartender_sam.text: I found him behind the bins at 4 AM. Cook didn't show for open. I thought he quit. He didn't.

options.text: Who had access to the alley?

bartender_sam.speaker: Sam
bartender_sam.text: Staff, deliveries, and anyone who cuts through to the river path. Owen was here late — again.

bartender_sam.speaker: Sam
bartender_sam.text: I just want to open the doors again without people staring.

correct.text: Owen snapped over a debt he couldn't pay. The cook cornered him; Owen used the kitchen knife and staged the freezer lock. Hollow learns even the charming ones keep score.

wrong_generic.text: Wrong call. The diner case cools and Sam loses half his regulars.
